source_title: Sea Establishes AI Centre of Excellence in Singapore to Drive AI-Native Innovation and Capability Building
claim: Sea announced the establishment of an Artificial Intelligence Centre of Excellence (AI CoE) in Singapore, with support from Digital Industry Singapore, to support research and business application of AI and strategic capability building.
research_implication: Signals SEA is investing in in-house AI capability, a counterweight to the reliance-on-partners signal from the OpenAI and Google deals.
